title: pdfgate text result
description: stdout of `pdfgate text <file> [--pages a-b] [--max-chars n]` on exit code 0.

pages.description: Number of pages text was extracted from

truncated.description: True when text was cut at --max-chars

text.description: Extracted text. Unicode-normalized by the extractor (e.g. the ﬁ ligature becomes "fi").
